summary: PDF Preview Chrome blocking fix verified. PreviewModal no longer uses iframe/embed. Modal shows file card with 'Buka PDF di Tab Baru' and 'Download PDF' buttons. All 5 test scenarios passed.
seed_data_creation: Used localStorage injection for pegawai settings and kegiatan data
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF Preview fix verified working. PreviewModal uses pdf().toBlob() + window.open, no iframe/embed. Buttons: view-pdf-btn, download-pdf-btn, close-preview-btn, close-preview-bottom-btn all working. Note: 'Membuat PDF...' loading state may be very brief or skip directly to ready state. Modal shows immediately with buttons (PDF gen is fast). 0 hari kerja tersimpan shown when localStorage kegiatan has disimpan:true but modal counts correctly.

test_results_detail.T2_modal_opens: PASS - preview-modal opens on preview-pdf-btn click
test_results_detail.T3_buttons_present: PASS - view-pdf-btn and download-pdf-btn both present
